{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230057553DAD21A13F8312C4B60B"}"},"total":1506},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7430388022583657240","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好看，结构紧凑，故事情节脑洞大开，男主设计有胆识有情趣有一往无前的勇气也有一心一意的爱情，女主绝代佳人对爱情义无反顾为了男主不惜牺牲自我，这是一本值得推荐的好书！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1730027139,"group_id":"7139436087075671054","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"随遇而安","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzZYeKi9Vyxyt6pxE4tiYGeZejXiSDuOsyS+7T6sm4DB","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"3935869240349955","user_name":"风小恋"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3935869240349955","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7139436087075671054","book_info":{"abstract":"京城四月，烟火人间，然而看似平静的表面下却暗流涌动。
少年杨昭因意外来到这个光怪陆离的仙侠世界，并卷入漩涡中心。
…
大千世界，万族林立，仙魔并起。
圣地、宗门、朝堂、家族……
这是一个以爱之名，书以长生大道的故事。
（作者已有完本作品保证，请放心入坑）（单女主）
